top_signals.verdict: RE-ENABLE - consistently high but low samples
RE-ENABLE for XAU - strong recent surge

worst_signals.verdict: DISABLE globally, but 64.8% on ETH -- per-ticker gate
Per-ticker gate: keep for BTC/XAG, disable for XAU
CORRECT to disable globally. Re-enable for crypto ONLY.

correlation_clusters.name: momentum_cluster
correlation_clusters.note: All use price momentum/trend indicators. Redundant information when trending.

correlation_clusters.name: mean_reversion_cluster
correlation_clusters.note: RSI and BB overlap with mean_reversion but BB has independent volatility component.

correlation_clusters.name: llm_cluster
correlation_clusters.note: All LLMs see similar features. qwen3 has distinct SELL bias (72.7% SELL accuracy).

correlation_clusters.name: regime_cluster
correlation_clusters.note: Different regime detection methods. drift_regime_gate is star, others mediocre.

regime_performance.observation: In ranging regime, trend-following signals (ema, macd, momentum) systematically underperform. Mean reversion (rsi, bb, mean_reversion) outperform. Current weights do NOT adjust enough for this.

critical_finding.title: Per-ticker signal accuracy divergence is the #1 problem
critical_finding.detail: Signals like credit_spread_risk (57% BTC vs 17% XAG) and statistical_jump_regime (61% BTC vs 50% XAU) have massive per-ticker accuracy differences. Using them globally destroys metals/ETH consensus. System has NO EDGE on 4/5 instruments.
critical_finding.root_cause: No per-ticker signal gating beyond DISABLED_SIGNALS list.
critical_finding.fix: Implement per-ticker per-signal accuracy gating: if signal X has <47% accuracy for ticker Y (>=30 samples), force HOLD for that ticker.

recommendations.title: Implement per-ticker signal accuracy gating
recommendations.description: Gate signals per-ticker based on per-ticker accuracy from signal_log.db. If signal has <47% accuracy for a specific ticker with >=30 samples, force HOLD for that ticker.
recommendations.expected_impact: HIGH - could improve metals consensus from 49.6% to 55%+

recommendations.title: Re-enable williams_vix_fix for metals (XAU, XAG)
recommendations.description: williams_vix_fix has 76.5% accuracy on XAU (68 sam) and 60.9% on XAG (92 sam). Currently disabled globally. Enable per-ticker.
recommendations.expected_impact: MEDIUM - adds high-accuracy voter for metals

recommendations.title: Disable crypto_evrp or gate it to ETH-only
recommendations.description: crypto_evrp regressed to 40.2% recent. But per-ticker it is 64.8% on ETH. Gate to ETH-only.

recommendations.title: Boost drift_regime_gate weight
recommendations.description: drift_regime_gate at 68.1% recent (626 sam) is star performer. No weight boost currently.

recommendations.title: Disable statistical_jump_regime for XAU
recommendations.description: statistical_jump_regime at 50.2% for XAU adds noise. Keep for BTC (61.3%) and XAG (60.3%).
